creator: bz@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Bill Blake from comment #1)

Bill, if you have examples that would be helpful; the contents of these dumps matter.  At least we could go and figure out which command is causing them for you too.

Whether or not they will be fixed is a different question as the focus is more on getting iwlwifi up to speed which will sooner or later deprecate iwm but if it's a similar issue it may also be a quick fix and I'd be willing to give it a few minutes to look.
